findings.description: PascalCase class names referenced in the related handlers table are missing from s1 hints: MessageReplyHandler, TransactionManagementHandler, MessagingAction.
findings.source_evidence: Source 概要 section lists all three in the 関連するハンドラ table.

findings.description: Property names used in SentMessageTableSchema configuration are missing from s3 hints: tableName, replyQueueColumnName, statusCodeColumnName.
findings.source_evidence: Source 設定項目・拡張ポイント section XML: `<property name="tableName" .../>`, `<property name="replyQueueColumnName" .../>`, `<property name="statusCodeColumnName" .../>`.
